title: ‘Erosion of a country’s future’: What has the war cost Sudan?
content: Sudan's civil war, which erupted three years ago, has devastated civilian infrastructure, pushed millions into misery.

originalTitle: Every 27 minutes, someone is killed in Sudan’s war

content: Every day, over the last three years in Sudan, 53 people on average are killed.
